meta.source: SkillsFuture ICT Framework, Mavenside Upskilling SG 2025, Hays SG, MyCareersFuture

categories.name: AI & Machine Learning
categories.source: SkillsFuture ICT Framework Track 4 + GenAI Refresh March 2025

skills.name: Prompt Engineering
skills.desc: Design and optimise prompts for LLMs. GenAI skill added March 2025 by IMDA refresh.

skills.name: Machine Learning Fundamentals
skills.desc: Supervised/unsupervised learning, model evaluation. TensorFlow, PyTorch basics.

skills.name: Natural Language Processing
skills.desc: Text classification, NER, sentiment analysis, transformer architectures.

skills.name: Computer Vision
skills.desc: CNNs, object detection, image segmentation with PyTorch / OpenCV.

skills.name: MLOps & Model Deployment
skills.desc: Model versioning, CI/CD for ML, monitoring in production.

skills.name: AI Ethics & Governance
skills.desc: Responsible AI implementation. Required by MAS and PDPA guidelines.

skills.name: GenAI Application Development
skills.desc: Build apps on top of LLM APIs. RAG pipelines, agent frameworks.

skills.name: Threat Intelligence
skills.desc: IOC analysis, MITRE ATT&CK framework, threat hunting.

skills.name: Security Fundamentals (CEH)
skills.desc: Core security concepts, CIA triad, OWASP Top 10.

skills.name: Penetration Testing
skills.desc: Web/network pen testing with Burp Suite, Metasploit, Nmap.

skills.name: Cloud Security (CCSP)
skills.desc: Zero-trust architecture, cloud SIEM, container security.

skills.name: PDPA & MAS Compliance
skills.desc: Singapore Personal Data Protection Act, MAS TRM Guidelines.

skills.name: Incident Response
skills.desc: IR playbooks, forensics, SIEM tools (Splunk, QRadar).

skills.name: SQL & Database Management
skills.desc: Complex queries, stored procedures, optimisation across RDBMS.

skills.name: Python for Data Science
skills.desc: Pandas, NumPy, SciPy, Jupyter notebooks.

skills.name: Data Visualisation
skills.desc: Tableau, Power BI, Qlik. Storytelling with data.

skills.name: Statistical Analysis
skills.desc: Regression, hypothesis testing, A/B testing design.

skills.name: Business Intelligence
skills.desc: Dashboard strategy, KPI definition, self-serve analytics.

skills.name: Big Data & Spark
skills.desc: Hadoop ecosystem, Spark, Kafka, data lake architecture.

skills.name: AWS Certified Solutions Architect
skills.desc: Core AWS services, high-availability architecture, IAM.

skills.name: Azure / GCP Fundamentals
skills.desc: Cloud concepts, compute, storage, networking on Azure or GCP.

skills.name: Kubernetes & Docker
skills.desc: Container orchestration, Helm, service mesh.

skills.name: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
skills.desc: Terraform, CloudFormation, Pulumi for repeatable infra.

skills.name: CI/CD Pipelines
skills.desc: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI, deployment strategies.

categories.name: Software Engineering

skills.name: Full-Stack Development
skills.desc: React/Next.js frontend + Node.js/Python backend, REST & GraphQL APIs.

skills.name: System Design
skills.desc: Distributed systems, CAP theorem, design interviews.

skills.name: Java / Spring Boot
skills.desc: Enterprise Java, microservices, Spring ecosystem.

skills.name: Python Programming
skills.desc: Scripting, automation, Django/FastAPI web frameworks.

skills.name: Mobile Development (iOS/Android)
skills.desc: Swift, Kotlin, React Native, Flutter.

skills.name: Agile & Scrum (CSM)
skills.desc: Sprint planning, backlog grooming, Jira, velocity tracking.

skills.name: Financial Modelling
skills.desc: DCF, LBO, M&A models. Excel, Python for finance.

skills.name: Risk Management
skills.desc: Market, credit, operational risk frameworks. Basel III/IV.

skills.name: MAS Regulatory Compliance
skills.desc: MAS 626, SGX listing rules, AML/CFT frameworks.

skills.name: ESG & Sustainable Finance
skills.desc: Carbon accounting, green bonds, TCFD reporting, Singapore Green Plan 2030.

skills.name: FinTech & Blockchain
skills.desc: DeFi, payment rails, RegTech, MAS sandbox.

skills.name: FP&A (Financial Planning)',
skills.desc: Budgeting, forecasting, variance analysis, management reporting.

skills.name: PMP / CAPM Certification
skills.desc: PMI project management methodology, risk, scope, schedule.

skills.name: Process Improvement (Lean/Six Sigma)
skills.desc: Kaizen, DMAIC, VSM. Green Belt / Black Belt pathway.

skills.name: Supply Chain Management
skills.desc: Demand forecasting, vendor management, SCOR framework.

skills.name: Business Analysis (CBAP)
skills.desc: Requirements elicitation, process mapping, stakeholder analysis.

skills.name: Automation & RPA
skills.desc: UiPath, Power Automate. Robotics Process Automation for operations.

skills.name: SEO & SEM
skills.desc: Organic search optimisation, Google Ads, keyword strategy.

skills.name: Social Media Marketing
skills.desc: LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok strategy, influencer partnerships.

skills.name: Marketing Automation & CRM
skills.desc: HubSpot, Salesforce, Marketo. Lead nurturing workflows.

skills.name: Content Strategy
skills.desc: Audience research, content calendars, copywriting, brand voice.

skills.name: Performance Marketing
skills.desc: ROAS optimisation, multi-channel attribution, conversion funnels.

skills.name: E-Commerce & Digital Commerce
skills.desc: Shopify, Lazada, Shopee. Cross-border e-commerce, SEA markets.
